task_completion.description: Navigate to the PCI-DSS v4.0 compliance package
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba interface shows 'PCI-DSS v4.0' selected or active in the Compliance Management or Compliance Analysis section.
The specific requirement 'Req 6.3.3 - Install critical patches within one month of release' is visible in the list of compliance items.

task_completion.description: Open the form to add a new Compliance Analysis for Req 6.3.3
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form, modal, or page titled 'Add Compliance Analysis' (or similar) is open and associated with Req 6.3.3.

task_completion.description: Set the compliance status to 'Not Compliant'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status dropdown, radio button, or field in the analysis form is explicitly set to 'Not Compliant' (or equivalent non-compliant status).

task_completion.description: Enter the required analysis description with all specified keywords
task_completion.visual_evidence: The description text area contains the required text, specifically including the keywords: '30-day SLA', '47 days', 'Q2 2025', 'compensating controls', and 'network segmentation'.

task_completion.description: Save the new Compliance Analysis record
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success notification is visible, or the newly created analysis record appears in the Eramba data table for Req 6.3.3 showing the 'Not Compliant' status.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Eramba graphical user interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Eramba web application, rather than terminal windows executing API or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the actual Eramba application
integrity.visual_evidence: The description text and status are entered into Eramba's web form fields, not typed into a separate text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the record rather than just filling out the form
integrity.visual_evidence: The final screenshots show the saved record in a view mode or a success message, proving the form was submitted and not just abandoned.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Package: 'PCI-DSS v4.0'. Target Requirement: 'Req 6.3.3 - Install critical patches within one month of release'. Expected Status: 'Not Compliant' (or non_compliant). Required Description Keywords: '30-day SLA', '47 days', 'compensating controls', 'network segmentation', 'Q2 2025'.
